title: handle_wallet_pay: session persisted before relay send — orphaned session on send failure
description: api.rs handle_wallet_pay persists the PaymentSession (state=Requested) before sending the BROADCAST to the relay. If relay_tx is unavailable or send fails after the write, the handler returns 503 but the session row exists in DB in Requested state with no counterparty knowledge. The session will never advance. Fix: only persist the session after successful relay send, or delete the orphaned session on send failure.
